description: Order of payment for 5 dinars signed by Abū Zikrī Kohen, dated Nisan 1455 (= 1144 CE). The banker’s name is Abū l-Faraj al-Kohen and Abū Zikrī writes וכתב before his signature, which is atypical. The cheque is crossed through with vertical lines. Arabic jottings on verso. (Information from CUDL)
tags: IB5, order of payment, India, cheque
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
